title: Tarp-Hard-Xenon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tarp-Hard-Xenon''' was a sector in a computer stolen by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]]. It was the location of schematics for the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

==Behind the scenes==
Tarp-Hard-Xenon is a reference to ''THX 1138''. [[Wikipedia:Xenon|Xenon]] is a real world element.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]

[[Category:Data storage and processing]]
